zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathew Gernon於大約1080年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Robert de Gernon III36歲，母親Emma de Dinan42歲。他於大約1115年與Hodierna. Sackville在法國諾門迪結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1161年之後在英國英格蘭艾可布勒斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathew Gernon was born about 1080, in Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Gernon III, was 36 and his mother, Emma de Dinan, was 42. He married Hodierna. Sackville about 1115, in Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1161, in Bures, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathew Gernon(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Gernon III(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Dinan(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1115년 프랑스 노먼디에서 Hodierna. Sackville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1161년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 버스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathew Gernon nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Gernon III, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Dinan, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Hodierna. Sackville aproximadamente 1115, em Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1161, em Bures, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bures Saint Mary, Essex, England: малдон ст мэри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathew Gernon родился около 1080 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Gernon III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Dinan, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Hodierna. Sackville около 1115 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1161 г. в местности буресь, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
